feedback.text: As a consumer of digital goods my access to purchased items is murky. There are games which I have purchased which I am now unable to play. This is one of the few areas in which a seller can revoke the thing which I paid for. As a parent, I am also worried about the current, predatory, trend of lootboxes and other gacha systems. I want digital goods, games or not, to be better for consumers rather than producers/sellers. Digital preservation, much like books, paintings and other forms of art and expression is important, the current state of the industry is against this preservation. Have an awesome day!
